entry.title: New: Bill 2935 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2024-12-11
entry.content:
A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING ORDINANCE NO. B 2024-896, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF KAUA‘I, STATE OF HAWAI‘I, FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2024 THROUGH JUNE 30, 2025, FOR THE PURPOSES OF FUNDING EXPENDITURES CAUSED BY HEAVY RAINS AND SEVERE FLOODING WHICH STARTED ON APRIL 11, 2024, BY REVISING THE AMOUNTS ESTIMATED IN THE GENERAL FUND

Latest action: On agenda 2024-12-11

View on the council site
